node.statement: ESTIMATE (5.1): ||P((h o t) o u)|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, where h=h_{r,s} and t,u in A. Put y:=h o t in B(H)_sa. By P^2=P (GT-Pprops), y=P(y)+(y-P(y)) with P(y) in Im P=A and (y-P(y)) in Ker P (since P(y-P(y))=P(y)-P^2(y)=P(y)-P(y)=0). By real-linearity of P (GT-Pprops): P(y o u)=P(P(y) o u)+P((y-P(y)) o u). RANGE part [proved in child 1.2.1]: ||P(P(y) o u)|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||. KERNEL part [proved in child 1.2.2]: ||P((y-P(y)) o u)|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||. Adding the two (triangle inequality, GT-bh-cstar) gives ||P((h o t) o u)|| = ||P(y o u)|| <= 2C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, i.e. (5.1) with constant absorbed.
